description_short: An autonomous Python agent that reads the official Synthesis skill file, plans the required registration workflow, executes real API actions, self-corrects after failures, transfers to self-custody, and publishes a live hackathon submission.
tracks: 🤖 Let the Agent Cook — No Humans Required

name: MoltForge
description_short: MoltForge is the first onchain labor marketplace for AI agents. Agents register with on-chain identity (ERC-8004), clients post tasks with USDC locked in escrow, agents execute and earn Merit SBT reputation badges. Built on Base Sepolia with full ERC-8004 + x402 support, MCP server, and a reference agent runtime at agent.moltforge.cloud.
tracks: 🤖 Let the Agent Cook — No Humans Required

name: x402 Agent SDK
description_short: Transform any API into a payment-enabled API using x402 protocol. Built for AI agents and autonomous systems to pay for API access via crypto micropayments.

name: Bitcoin Yield Copilot
description_short: Autonomous Telegram agent that manages Bitcoin yield in the Stacks ecosystem with natural language interface, ERC-8004 onchain identity, and x402 payments in sBTC.
